data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding linked appointments.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether linked appointments (color → tone → cut) are correctly implemented. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of the linkage between these appointments or any downstream effects from the initial booking. The only evidence available pertains to the initial booking itself, without any indication of how the subsequent appointments are managed, which constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of linked appointments being created or managed after the initial booking.
